name: Queue

unions.name: Queue
unions.comment: Representation of First-In, First-Out(FIFO) data structure.

values.name: dequeue
values.comment:
Returns queue without the oldest element of the given queue.

    empty
        |> enqueue "e"
        |> enqueue "l"
        |> enqueue "m"
        |> enqueue "i"
        |> enqueue "s"
        |> enqueue "h"
        |> dequeue
        |> head
    --> Just "l"

values.name: empty
values.comment:
Returns empty queue.

    head empty == Nothing

values.name: enqueue
values.comment:
Inject a new element into the rear side of the queue.

    empty
        |> enqueue 100
        |> enqueue 200
        |> head
    --> Just 100

values.name: fromListFIFO
values.comment:
Create queue from list.
The oldest element of the list comes head of the queue.

    []
        |> (::) "H" -- The First-In element is "H"
        |> (::) "e"
        |> (::) "l"
        |> (::) "l"
        |> (::) "o"
        |> fromListFIFO
        |> head
    --> Just "H"

values.name: fromListLIFO
values.comment:
Create queue from list.
The newest element comes head of the queue.

    [ "H" -- The Last-In element is "H"
    , "e"
    , "l"
    , "l"
    , "o"
    ]
        |> fromListLIFO
        |> head
    --> Just "H"

values.name: head
values.comment:
Returns the oldest element injected in the queue wrapped in `Maybe`.

    empty
        |> head
    --> Nothing

    empty
        |> enqueue "e"
        |> enqueue "l"
        |> enqueue "m"
        |> head
    --> Just "e"

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment:
Returns `True` if the argument has no element.

    empty
        |> enqueue "a"
        |> isEmpty
    --> False

    empty
        |> enqueue "a"
        |> dequeue
        |> isEmpty
    --> True

values.name: length
values.comment:
Returns how many elements is contained in the queue. The time complexity is _O(log N)_.

    empty
        |> length
    --> 0

    empty
        |> enqueue 1
        |> enqueue 2
        |> enqueue 3
        |> dequeue
        |> length
    --> 2

values.name: rear
values.comment:
Returns the newest element if exists, wrapped in `Maybe`.
Worst-case time complexity of this operation is _O(log N)_.

    empty
        |> enqueue 100
        |> enqueue 200
        |> rear
    --> Just 200

    empty
        |> enqueue 100
        |> dequeue
        |> rear
    --> Nothing

values.name: toListFIFO
values.comment:
Convert a queue to List. The First-In element in the queue will become the head of the returned list.

    empty
        |> enqueue 100 -- The First-In element is 100
        |> enqueue 200
        |> enqueue 300
        |> toListFIFO
    --> [100,200,300]

values.name: toListLIFO
values.comment:
Convert a queue to List. The Last-In element in the queue will become the head of the returned list.

    empty
        |> enqueue 100
        |> enqueue 200
        |> enqueue 300 -- The Last-In element is 300
        |> toListLIFO
    --> [300,200,100]
